description: Positive trigger — landmark extractor receives valid 30-frame video clip
rubric: output shape is exactly (30, 2172)
no NaN values in array
file saved to data/landmarks/ with matching filename

description: Positive trigger — handles video shorter than 30 frames by zero-padding
rubric: output shape is still (30, 2172) despite short input
padded frames are zeros, not repeated frames

description: Negative trigger — should NOT use this skill for audio files
rubric: skill does not trigger
returns clear error: unsupported file type

description: Positive trigger — Transformer model predicts correct sign with high confidence
rubric: predicted word matches ground truth label
confidence score is between 0 and 1
inference time under 100ms on CPU
model.eval() was called before inference
torch.no_grad() context was used

description: Positive trigger — rejects low confidence prediction, returns null word
rubric: word is null when confidence < 0.85
confidence score is still returned for debugging
no word is added to word buffer

description: Negative trigger — should NOT accept raw video frames as input
rubric: skill does not accept raw frames
returns ValueError: input must be pre-extracted landmarks of shape (30, 2172)

description: Positive trigger — model is NOT reloaded on second inference call (loaded once at startup)
rubric: load_model() called exactly once across both predictions
second inference reuses the already-loaded model
both predictions return valid word or null with confidence score

description: Adversarial — wrong input shape should raise clear error, not crash server
rubric: raises ValueError mentioning expected shape (30, 2172)
FastAPI returns HTTP 422 with clear error message
server does not crash

description: Positive trigger — word list produces grammatical sentence
rubric: output is a single grammatical sentence
output contains the semantic meaning of all input words
output does not contain the raw word list
response time under 3 seconds

description: Positive trigger — handles single word input
rubric: returns a complete sentence like 'Hello!' or 'Hello there.'
does not return just the bare word 'hello'

description: Negative trigger — empty word list must NOT call Gemini API
rubric: Gemini API is NOT called
returns validation error: word list is empty

description: Adversarial — Gemini API failure must fall back gracefully, not crash
rubric: Gemini API call fails (simulated)
fallback returns joined words as basic sentence: 'Name what you.'
FastAPI endpoint returns 200, not 500
error is logged but not exposed to user

description: Positive trigger — reviews a PR with a hardcoded API key
rubric: flags hardcoded API key as CRITICAL
suggests using environment variable instead
does not approve the PR

description: Negative trigger — docs-only PR should be skipped
rubric: code review skill does not trigger
returns: no code changes detected, skipping review

description: Positive trigger — catches missing model.eval() before inference
rubric: flags missing model.eval() as ML Issue
explains that dropout remains active without eval() causing inconsistent predictions
suggests adding model.eval() before inference
